notable_level_patterns.description: Game organized into 5 worlds with multiple levels per world (implied by level skip reaching ending at Level 5-4)

sources_used: tcrf - Kiwi Kraze - The Cutting Room Floor
extraction_notes: T3 tier data with very limited design documentation available. Source only provides technical/meta information (level select cheat, reset check string, regional differences, publisher/developer credits). No gameplay mechanics breakdown, pacing details, spatial design philosophy, or level progression documentation found in available sources. Game is NES port of arcade title 'The NewZealand Story' - original arcade documentation would be required for detailed element introduction order and rhythm patterns.
